response.justification: The candidate brings 20 years of solid technical engineering across diverse domains with demonstrated leadership and mentoring capability. However, this role requires a Director-level strategic advisor with recognized AI/ML expertise and demonstrated products, whereas the candidate's background is primarily hands-on engineering. Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, April 2025-present) shows emerging interest in AI but is too recent and infrastructure-focused to establish the deep AI product expertise or strategic decision-making experience the role demands. The technical foundation is strong enough to warrant conversation, but significant gaps in AI specialization and strategic-level experience create material concerns for this particular role.
strengths: 20 years of engineering breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains with strong mentoring track record demonstrated through workshops, conference talks, and team leadership
Staff-level positions and founder of open-source GISCollective platform show entrepreneurial capability within technical organizations and ability to drive long-term technical initiatives
Recent pivot to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development at re:cinq shows awareness of and interest in current AI/ML tooling trends
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML-related field; formal education in Computer Science and Photography/Image Processing does not establish AI/ML specialization required for strategic principal role

All prior roles are hands-on technical positions (Staff/Senior Developer) with no evidence of director-level strategic responsibilities, customer advisory experience, or shaping organizational AI strategy
MCP and AI-agent work only began April 2025; insufficient track record to claim 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' as required by job specification
